name: SlAlert
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from extract/pilots/shoelace/custom-elements.json (components/alert/alert.js) (cem adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: open
props.description:
Indicates whether or not the alert is open. You can toggle this attribute to show and hide the alert, or you can
use the `show()` and `hide()` methods and this attribute will reflect the alert's open state.

props.name: closable
props.description: Enables a close button that allows the user to dismiss the alert.

props.name: countdown
props.description:
Enables a countdown that indicates the remaining time the alert will be displayed.
Typically used to indicate the remaining time before a whole app refresh.

events.name: show
events.description: Emitted when the alert opens. (CEM event "sl-show")

events.name: afterShow
events.description: Emitted after the alert opens and all animations are complete. (CEM event "sl-after-show")

events.name: hide
events.description: Emitted when the alert closes. (CEM event "sl-hide")

events.name: afterHide
events.description: Emitted after the alert closes and all animations are complete. (CEM event "sl-after-hide")
